title: Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) Attestation
description: SD-JWT VC schema for the WeBuild UBO Attestation (vct: eu.we-build:ubo:1). Provides a standardized, verifiable representation of the natural persons who ultimately own or control a legal entity, compliant with AMLR 2024/1624.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type identifier. SHALL be the fixed string 'eu.we-build:ubo:1'.

iss.description: Issuer identifier (DID or URI) of the entity that issued this attestation.

iat.description: Issued-at time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be in the past.

exp.description: Expiry time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be greater than iat.

jti.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (JWT ID).

issuing_entity.description: Identifier of the legal entity subject to the UBO disclosure obligation.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation per eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA' (self-issued) or 'QEAA' (issued by a QTSP or authorised competent body). NOT selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the schema used for this attestation.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL where the trust anchor for verifying this attestation can be retrieved.

ubo.description: Array of Ultimate Beneficial Owner entries. SHALL contain at least one UBO entry.

status.description: Revocation status claim. MUST be present if the validity period is greater than 24 hours.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential document containing the status bitstring.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring corresponding to this credential.

cnf.description: Confirmation claim binding the credential to the holder's key material per RFC 7800.

jwk.description: JSON Web Key of the holder.

UBOEntry.title: UBOEntry
UBOEntry.description: A single Ultimate Beneficial Owner entry containing personal identity, address, identifier, justification, and source attributes.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction of the subject legal entity. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

citizenship.description: Citizenship(s) held by the natural person. SHALL contain at least one valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. MAY contain multiple entries for persons holding multiple nationalities.

contact_address.description: Optional alternative contact address for the natural person.

person_unique_identifier.description: Optional unique identifier assigned by an authority to uniquely identify the natural person.

effective_date.description: Date from which UBO status has been effective. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the past.

source.description: Supporting evidence substantiating the UBO determination. SHALL contain at least one entry.

Person.title: Person
Person.description: Personal identity attributes of the natural person identified as UBO.

first_name.description: First name(s) of the natural person, including middle names where applicable. SHALL be non-empty.

surname.description: Surname(s) / family name(s) of the natural person. SHALL be non-empty.

birth_date.description: Date of birth of the natural person. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) in the past. Optional — may be omitted in specific jurisdictions.

BirthPlace.title: BirthPlace
BirthPlace.description: Place of birth of the natural person.

locality.description: City or locality of birth. SHALL be non-empty.

country.description: Country of birth. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

region.description: Region or state of birth. Optional.

ResidentialAddress.title: ResidentialAddress
ResidentialAddress.description: Registered residential address of the natural person.

street.description: Street name of the residential address. SHALL be non-empty.

house_number.description: House or building number of the residential address. SHALL be non-empty.

locality.description: City or locality of the residential address. SHALL be non-empty.

region.description: Region or state of the residential address. SHALL be non-empty.

postal_code.description: Postal code of the residential address. SHALL be non-empty.

country.description: Country of the residential address. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

ContactAddress.title: ContactAddress
ContactAddress.description: Optional alternative contact address for the natural person. If present, all fields are required.

street.description: Street name of the contact address.

house_number.description: House or building number of the contact address.

locality.description: City or locality of the contact address.

region.description: Region or state of the contact address.

postal_code.description: Postal code of the contact address.

country.description: Country of the contact address. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

PersonIdentifier.title: PersonIdentifier
PersonIdentifier.description: Government-issued identity document used to identify the natural person.

document_type.description: Type of identity document. SHALL use one of the enumerated values from Section 2.8.1.

document_number.description: Number of the identity document as printed on the document. SHALL be non-empty.

issuing_country.description: Country that issued the identity document. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

expiry_date.description: Expiry date of the identity document. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

PersonUniqueIdentifier.title: PersonUniqueIdentifier
PersonUniqueIdentifier.description: Optional unique identifier assigned by an authority to uniquely identify the natural person across systems.

identifier_unique.description: A unique identifier assigned to the natural person by an issuing authority.

identifier_issuing_authority.description: The authority that issued the unique identifier.

Justification.title: Justification
Justification.description: How and why this natural person qualifies as a UBO under AMLR 2024/1624.

threshold_met.description: Array of applicable AML thresholds or control criteria met by this UBO. SHALL use values from Section 2.8.2. SHALL contain at least one value.

items.description: A single AML threshold or control criterion code from Section 2.8.2.

ownership_percentage.description: Total direct and indirect ownership percentage held by the UBO (0–100). SHOULD be provided if threshold_met includes 'ownership_25_plus'.

voting_rights_percentage.description: Total direct and indirect voting rights percentage held by the UBO (0–100). SHOULD be provided if threshold_met includes 'control_voting_25_plus'.

control_details.description: Free text description of control exercised through means other than ownership percentage. SHALL be provided if threshold_met includes 'control_other_means'.

Source.title: Source
Source.description: Supporting evidence substantiating the UBO determination. At least one source SHALL be present per UBO entry.

id.description: Unique identifier for the source document. SHALL be non-empty.

type.description: Type of source document. SHOULD use values from Section 2.8.5.

url.description: URI reference to the source or evidence document. Optional.

data.description: Base64-encoded source document. SHALL be provided if url is not a publicly accessible URI.
